cards.upright_keywords: New beginnings, innocence, spontaneity, free spirit
cards.reversed_keywords: Recklessness, taken advantage of, inconsideration
cards.upright_effect: Wild card: counts as any suit for chains. +5 Insight to all cards in spread
cards.reversed_effect: Recklessness: shuffles your hand, but gives x2 Resonance to next card placed

cards.upright_keywords: Manifestation, resourcefulness, power, inspired action
cards.reversed_keywords: Manipulation, poor planning, untapped talents
cards.upright_effect: All 4 elements count as present (enables cross-element combos)
cards.reversed_effect: Manipulation: choose any card from draw pile, but +2 Veil

cards.upright_keywords: Intuition, sacred knowledge, divine feminine, the subconscious
cards.reversed_keywords: Secrets, disconnected from intuition, withdrawal, silence
cards.upright_effect: Reveal all cards in draw pile for this reading. +10 Insight if Cups present
cards.reversed_effect: Hidden knowledge remains hidden: Resonance doubled but you cannot see combo previews

cards.upright_keywords: Femininity, beauty, nature, nurturing, abundance
cards.reversed_keywords: Creative block, dependence, emptiness
cards.upright_effect: All Cups and Pentacles cards gain +5 Insight. Nurture chain: adjacent cards gain +3 Insight
cards.reversed_effect: Stifled growth: one random suit loses -3 Insight, but Major Arcana gain +10

cards.upright_keywords: Authority, establishment, structure, father figure
cards.reversed_keywords: Domination, excessive control, rigidity, inflexibility
cards.upright_effect: All Wands and Swords cards gain +5 Resonance. Structure: position match bonuses x1.5
cards.reversed_effect: Rigidity: position matches give no bonus, but base Insight of all cards x1.5

cards.upright_keywords: Spiritual wisdom, tradition, conformity, education
cards.reversed_keywords: Personal beliefs, freedom, challenging the status quo
cards.upright_effect: Tradition: same-suit chains need 1 fewer card for bonus tier. +5 to Court cards
cards.reversed_effect: Rebellion: chains broken, but each unique suit in spread gives x1.5 Resonance

cards.upright_keywords: Love, harmony, relationships, values alignment
cards.reversed_keywords: Self-love, disharmony, imbalance, misalignment
cards.upright_effect: Union: two adjacent cards combine their Resonance. Highest combo potential
cards.reversed_effect: Separation: two cards score independently at x2 each, but cannot chain

cards.upright_keywords: Control, willpower, success, determination
cards.reversed_keywords: Self-discipline lacking, opposition, lack of direction
cards.upright_effect: Momentum: each card placed after this one gets cumulative +3 Insight
cards.reversed_effect: Loss of control: cards score in reverse order, but final card gets x3

cards.upright_keywords: Strength, courage, persuasion, compassion
cards.reversed_keywords: Inner doubt, weakness, insecurity, low energy
cards.upright_effect: Courage: reversed cards give no Veil this reading. +5 Resonance to all
cards.reversed_effect: Inner weakness: +3 Veil, but all Resonance x1.5

cards.upright_keywords: Soul searching, introspection, being alone, inner guidance
cards.reversed_keywords: Isolation, loneliness, withdrawal, lost
cards.upright_effect: Solitude: if this is the only Major Arcana in spread, x3 Resonance
cards.reversed_effect: Isolation: -5 Insight to adjacent cards, but this card's Insight x3

cards.upright_keywords: Good luck, karma, life cycles, destiny, turning point
cards.reversed_keywords: Bad luck, resistance to change, breaking cycles
cards.upright_effect: Fate: trigger a random bonus effect (pool of 10 positive effects)
cards.reversed_effect: Bad luck: trigger a random penalty, but guaranteed +20 Resonance

cards.upright_keywords: Justice, fairness, truth, cause and effect, law
cards.reversed_keywords: Unfairness, lack of accountability, dishonesty
cards.upright_effect: Balance: if spread has equal upright and reversed cards, all Resonance x2
cards.reversed_effect: Imbalance: the dominant orientation gets x2, minority gets x0.5

cards.reversed_keywords: Delays, resistance, stalling, indecision
cards.upright_effect: Sacrifice: remove this card from spread, give its Insight to all others

cards.reversed_keywords: Resistance to change, personal transformation, inner purging
cards.upright_effect: Transformation: destroy one card in spread, gain x3 its Insight as Resonance
cards.reversed_effect: Stagnation: nothing is destroyed, all multipliers reduced to x1, but +30 flat Insight

cards.reversed_keywords: Imbalance, excess, self-healing, realignment
